response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators), but the role requires Director-level IC profile with 15+ years and recognized AI expertise. The resume shows roughly 13-14 years of professional experience, no demonstrated AI/ML products at scale, no advanced degree in an AI field, and no evidence of strategic advisory work with executives or large customers. The gap between a Senior/Staff IC and a Principal/Director-level AI strategy role is substantial.
strengths: Polyglot full-stack background across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Track record of community building through workshops, talks, and open-source projects (GISCollective)
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at the scale this Principal role demands
Experience level (~13-14 years, Senior/Staff) is below the 15-year Director-IC bar
No evidence of strategic customer advisory, executive influence, or cross-org technical leadership

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI product/platform leadership
Seniority gap vs. Principal/Director IC level
